name: resort-management-system
description: LuxuryResort: diploma Spring backend + legacy MERN coursework

scripts.install-all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../legacy/frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install
scripts.install-legacy: cd legacy/frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install
scripts.dev:app: docker compose -p luxuryresort --profile app up -d --build && npm run dev:diploma-frontend
scripts.start: npm run build && npm run start-backend
